summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Per-tenant data scoping, Live Jira/ServiceNow integration (simulation mode), and Per-user WebSocket notification preferences. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with SLA Live Connected banner, Ticketing tab with Jira/ServiceNow config, and NotificationPreferencesPanel with per-severity channels, quiet hours, and mute functionality.

minor.issue: Legacy global prefs doc may not have new fields (muted_severities, quiet_hours) - backward compatible behavior

critical_code_review_comments: Tenant data scoping uses backward-compatible filter that includes legacy docs without tenant_id field
Ticketing service correctly detects simulation mode when credentials are incomplete
Per-user notification preferences properly stores muted_severities, quiet_hours, per_severity channel toggles
WebSocket SLA manager supports user_id keyed connections for per-user notifications
NotificationPreferencesPanel component properly integrates with backend API
seed_data_creation: Test CVEs created with tenant_id during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three features fully functional: 1) Per-tenant data scoping applies backward-compatible filters ($or with tenant_id match or missing) on CVE dashboard, list, create, ticketing stats/list endpoints. 2) Jira/ServiceNow ticketing in SIMULATION MODE by default - configure real credentials for live integration. 3) Per-user notification preferences at /api/cve/sla/notification-preferences with ?user_id param, includes muted_severities, quiet_hours, per_severity channel toggles. NotificationPreferencesPanel component visible in SLA Tracker > Notifications sub-view.

mocked_apis_list: Jira REST API - simulated ticket creation/sync (no real credentials configured)
ServiceNow REST API - simulated incident creation (no real credentials configured)

per_tenant_data_scoping.login_returns_tenant_info: PASS - user has tenant_id and tenant_name fields
per_tenant_data_scoping.dashboard_without_auth: PASS - returns all data (no tenant filter)
per_tenant_data_scoping.create_cve_with_auth: PASS - sets tenant_id from authenticated user
per_tenant_data_scoping.backward_compatibility: PASS - includes legacy docs without tenant_id

ticketing_integration.create_ticket: PASS - creates simulated ticket with external_key
ticketing_integration.frontend_ticketing_tab: PASS - shows config panel, stats, ticket list, simulation mode indicator

per_user_notification_preferences.get_default_prefs: PASS - returns core fields (notify_on_warning, notify_on_breach, per_severity)
per_user_notification_preferences.update_user_prefs: PASS - saves muted_severities, quiet_hours, per_severity toggles
per_user_notification_preferences.check_muted_severity: PASS - returns all false for muted severity
per_user_notification_preferences.frontend_NotificationPreferencesPanel: PASS - renders in SLA Tracker > Notifications view with per-severity channels, quiet hours, mute toggles
per_user_notification_preferences.websocket_user_id_param: PASS - WebSocket endpoint accepts user_id query param

frontend_ui.sla_live_connected_banner: PASS - visible at top of CVE Management dashboard
frontend_ui.sla_tracker_tab: PASS - shows SLA compliance dashboard, sub-views
frontend_ui.sla_notifications_view: PASS - shows Auto-Escalation config, Per-Severity Notification Preferences, NotificationPreferencesPanel with per-severity channels/quiet hours/mute
frontend_ui.ticketing_tab: PASS - shows Jira/ServiceNow config panel, stats, ticket list with SIM badges
